task_completion.description: The agent successfully loads the CT scan data into a medical image viewer (e.g., 3D Slicer).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface (or similar) is visible with a head CT scan loaded, displaying the axial view of the brain.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the axial slice exhibiting the largest hemorrhage area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The viewer displays a slice with a large, bright (hyperdense) white region indicating the hemorrhage, distinct from the skull.

task_completion.description: The agent places measurement rulers to determine dimensions A and B on the hemorrhage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two linear measurement rulers are visible on the hemorrhage region: one along the longest axis (A) and another perpendicular to it (B).

task_completion.description: The agent inspects multiple slices or metadata to determine the vertical extent (C) of the hemorrhage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen scrolling through the slice stack containing the hemorrhage, checking slice numbers/thickness, or using a module to count slices.

task_completion.description: The agent drafts the JSON report containing the measurements, calculated volume, and surgical recommendation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing a JSON structure with keys like 'measurement_A_cm', 'calculated_volume_ml', and 'exceeds_30ml_threshold'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the measurement markup and the final report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog or terminal command confirms saving 'agent_measurements.mrk.json' and 'hemorrhage_report.json' to '~/Documents/SlicerData/ICH/'.

integrity.description: The agent uses the medical software GUI to perform measurements rather than guessing or using command-line shortcuts without visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor interaction with the viewer tools (rulers, scroll bars) is visible.

integrity.description: Measurements are physically placed on the hemorrhage (bright white area), not on the skull or background.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines overlay the hyperdense pixel region of the brain scan.

integrity.description: The values entered in the report appear consistent with the visual measurements shown on screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into the JSON file match the length values displayed next to the rulers in the viewer.
